case_title: FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA vs. AUSTIN, KIERA AKA KIERA ALANA AUSTIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, KIERA AKA KIERA ALANA AUSTIN SOCKWELL, CLINTON AKA CLINTON SOCKWELL II

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION, DBA FILLMORE CENTER APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN, KIERA AKA KIERA ALANA AUSTIN SOCKWELL, CLINTON AKA CLINTON SOCKWELL II THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1545 EDDY ST #219, LEASE FORFEITED, CONDITIONAL STAY TO 01-JUL-95 STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
